intro: Ruellia incomta, also known as the 'Blue Petunia', is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and upright growth habit. The health benefits of Ruellia incomta include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
